help.title: TMS Embarcador Log Axis
help.selectTopic: Select a topic from the side menu to view help content.
help.feedbackThanks: Thank you! We're glad it was helpful.
help.feedbackImprove: Thank you for the feedback! We will improve this section.

content.introText1: TMS Embarcador Log Axis is a complete transportation management solution (TMS - Transportation Management System) for logistics and transportation companies, offering total control over freight and distribution operations.
content.introText2: TMS Embarcador Log Axis helps manage all aspects of your logistics operation, providing real-time information access through an integrated system. The application is divided into several modules, each covering a different operational function.
content.introText3: TMS Embarcador Log Axis was developed to be a flexible and scalable solution. The application is available via web, with interfaces optimized for desktop and mobile devices.
content.introNote: This online help applies to the current version of TMS Embarcador Log Axis. If a feature or function is available in only one version, this should be clearly stated.
content.dashboardText: The Dashboard is the main screen of TMS Embarcador Log Axis, offering an overview of real-time transport operations.
content.ordersText: Module responsible for controlling and monitoring all transport orders.
content.invoicesText: Complete management of invoices related to transport operations.
content.ctesText: Complete control of issued and received transport documents.
content.calculatorText: Tool for freight calculation based on configurable tables.
content.calculatorFeature1: Calculation by weight, volume and distance

innovations.suggestButton: Didn't find what you were looking for? Click here to send a suggestion!

suggestions.successInfo: You can track the status of your request in the suggestions section.

organizationIsolation.title: Environment Isolation
organizationIsolation.description: Each environment has its own Google Maps API Key configuration
organizationIsolation.warning: When switching environments, you will need to configure a new API Key for Google Maps.

instructions.title: How to get Google Maps credentials:
instructions.step3: Go to "APIs and Services" > "Library" and enable: <1>Geocoding API</1>, <3>Maps JavaScript API</3>, and <5>Places API</5>
instructions.costs1: Google Maps Platform is not free for continuous production use. Requests (such as coordinate extraction, distance calculation, or address autocomplete) generate costs in dollars according to the official Google table.
instructions.costs2: It is mandatory to have a billing account (credit card) linked to Google Cloud, even if Google offers a recurring monthly credit of $200. We recommend setting up quotas/limits per API in the Console to avoid unexpected charges.

extractConsumo.title: Google Maps Request Statement
extractConsumo.subtitle: Detailed control of requests to the Google Maps API

form.apiKeyPlaceholder: Paste your OpenAI API Key here (sk-...)...
form.temperatureDescription: Higher values (0.8) make output more random, lower values (0.2) make it more deterministic
form.maxTokensDescription: Maximum number of tokens in generated response

models.gpt35turboDescription: Faster and more economical, ideal for simple tasks
models.gpt4Description: More advanced and accurate, better reasoning
models.gpt4oDescription: OpenAI's newest and most powerful model

organizationIsolation.title: Environment Isolation
organizationIsolation.description: Each environment has its own OpenAI API Key configuration. This ensures security and independent cost control.
organizationIsolation.warning: When switching environments, you will need to configure a new API Key for OpenAI.
organizationIsolation.step1: Each environment (Production, Staging, etc) has its own key
organizationIsolation.step2: Configurations are not shared between environments
organizationIsolation.step3: Switch environments in the menu to configure different keys

credentials.title: How to get ChatGPT (OpenAI) credentials:
credentials.step2: In the left menu, go to "API Keys"
credentials.step4: Copy the generated key and paste it in the field above

costs.title: OpenAI API Costs:
costs.warning1: The OpenAI API requires pre-paid credits or a configured billing method. If your balance expires or there is no credit card added on the platform ("Billing"), the system will return a limit exceeded error and the intelligence automation will stop responding.
costs.warning2: You will be charged per token (fraction of words) sent or received during data extraction from AI engines. Also pay attention to the choice of models; newer models like GPT-4 have significantly higher rates than base models like GPT-3.5.

extractPage.title: OpenAI Consumption Extract
extractPage.subtitle: Detailed control of requests and consumed tokens
